# normalize CLI Surface

Findings from source-code inspection of `~/git/rhizone/normalize` at workspace version 0.3.2.

---

## 1. CLI framework and architecture

**Primary framework:** `server-less` (the host repo, version 0.4.9 with features `cli`, `jsonschema`, `config`).
**Underlying parser:** `clap 4` (derive mode), generated by the `#[cli]` macro that server-less emits.

The CLI is defined in two layers:
- **Root service:** `crates/normalize/src/service/mod.rs` — `NormalizeService`, annotated with `#[cli(name = "normalize", ...)]` and `#[server(groups(...))]`. This is the top-level dispatch point. `main.rs` calls `service.cli_run_with_async(argv).await`.
- **Sub-services:** Each major group is a separate struct (e.g. `AnalyzeService`, `ViewService`, `RulesService`, …) in `crates/normalize/src/service/<name>.rs`, each annotated with its own `#[cli(name = "<group>", ...)]`. External crates add their own service structs under `crates/normalize-{budget,cfg,knowledge-graph,ratchet,rules}/src/service.rs`.

`main.rs` also handles two pre-parse dispatch paths:
- `--schema` (before clap): prints a JSON block containing the JSON Schema for `NormalizeConfig`.
- Symlink aliases (`jq → normalize`, `rg → normalize`, `ast-grep/sg → normalize`) and subcommand prefixes (`normalize jq …`, `normalize rg …`, `normalize ast-grep …`) that bypass server-less entirely.

Alias rewrites (in `main.rs::rewrite_aliases`):

| Typed | Runs |
|-------|------|
| `normalize search` / `normalize find` | `normalize grep` |
| `normalize lint` | `normalize rules run` |
| `normalize check` | `normalize ci` |
| `normalize refactor` | `normalize edit` |
| `normalize index` | `normalize structure rebuild` |

---

## 2. Command tree

Max nesting depth: **3 levels** (`normalize edit history list`, `normalize tools lint run`, `normalize tools test run`).

Most commands sit at depth 2 (`normalize <group> <subcommand>`). A handful at depth 1 are flat leaf commands on the root service (`normalize grep`, `normalize ci`, `normalize init`, …).

Approximate total command count: **~150** named entry-points across all services.

### Full tree

```
normalize                           (root — NormalizeService, service/mod.rs)
│
├── [depth-1 leaf commands]
│   ├── grep        <pattern> [path] [--root] [--limit] [--ignore-case] [--exclude] [--only]
│   ├── aliases     [--root]
│   ├── context     [--match KEY=VALUE ...] [--stdin] [--prefix] [--file PREFIX=PATH] [--all] [--list]
│   │               → subcommands: migrate [--apply]
│   ├── init        [--index] [--setup] [--dry-run]
│   ├── update      [--check]
│   ├── translate   <input> --to <lang> [--from] [--output]
│   ├── sync        [dest] [--all] [--root] [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--force] [--active N] [--repo glob] [--exclude glob]
│   ├── docs        <symbol[@version]> [--root] [--ecosystem] [--no-cache]
│   └── ci          [--no-syntax] [--no-native] [--no-fact] [--strict] [--sarif] [--root] [--path] [--limit]
│
├── view            (service/view.rs)
│   ├── view        <path> [--depth] [--symbol] [--line] [--only] [--exclude] …
│   ├── chunk       <path> [--symbol] [--context]
│   ├── referenced-by <symbol> [--root]
│   ├── list        [path] [--only] [--exclude] …
│   ├── references  <symbol> [--root]
│   ├── history     <path> [--limit]
│   ├── dependents  <symbol> [--root]
│   ├── trace       <symbol> [--root]
│   ├── graph       <path> [--depth]
│   ├── import-path <from> <to> [--root]
│   └── blame       <path> [--symbol]
│
├── edit            (service/edit.rs)
│   ├── context     <path> [--symbol] [--lines N]
│   ├── delete      <path> --symbol <name>
│   ├── replace     <path> --symbol <name> --with <code>
│   ├── swap        <path> --a <sym> --b <sym>
│   ├── insert      <path> --after <sym> --code <code>
│   ├── rename      <path> --symbol <old> --to <new>
│   ├── undo        [--steps N]
│   ├── redo        [--steps N]
│   ├── goto        <path> --symbol <name>
│   ├── batch       <ops-file>
│   ├── move        <path> --symbol <name> --to <dest>
│   ├── introduce-variable  <path> --symbol <name> --expr <expr>
│   ├── inline-variable     <path> --symbol <name>
│   ├── add-parameter       <path> --symbol <fn> --name <p> --type <t>
│   ├── inline-function     <path> --symbol <name>
│   ├── extract-function    <path> --start <l> --end <l> --name <name>
│   └── history             (sub-service, service/history.rs — depth 3)
│       ├── list    [--root] [--limit]
│       ├── diff    <id>
│       ├── status
│       ├── tree    [--root]
│       └── prune   [--older-than]
│
├── analyze         (service/analyze.rs)
│   ├── architecture    <path> [--format]
│   ├── health          [--root] [--weights …]
│   ├── all             [--root] [--format]
│   ├── security        [--root] [--only] [--exclude]
│   ├── docs            [--root]
│   ├── coupling-clusters [--root] [--min-cluster]
│   ├── activity        [--root] [--days N]
│   ├── repo-coupling   [--root]
│   ├── cross-repo-health [--root]
│   ├── summary         [--root]
│   ├── liveness        <path> [--root]
│   ├── effects         <path> [--root]
│   ├── exceptions      [--root]
│   ├── skeleton-diff   <path-a> <path-b>
│   └── (+ ~15 more — see rank group below; several analyze methods overlap with rank)
│
├── rank            (service/rank.rs — ranking outputs per file/function)
│   ├── complexity  [--root] [--limit] [--only] [--exclude]
│   ├── files       [--root] [--limit] [--metric]
│   ├── size        [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── ceremony    [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── hotspots    [--root] [--limit] [--days]
│   ├── coupling    [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── ownership   [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── test-ratio  [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── length      [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── test-gaps   [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── budget      [--root]
│   ├── density     [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── uniqueness  [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── imports     [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── surface     [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── depth-map   [--root]
│   ├── layering    [--root]
│   ├── module-health [--root]
│   ├── call-complexity [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── duplicates  [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── duplicate-types [--root] [--limit]
│   ├── fragments   [--root] [--limit]
│   └── contributors [--root] [--limit] [--days]
│
├── trend           (service/trend.rs)
│   ├── multi       [--root] [--metrics …] [--since]
│   ├── complexity  [--root] [--since]
│   ├── length      [--root] [--since]
│   ├── density     [--root] [--since]
│   └── test-ratio  [--root] [--since]
│
├── rules           (crates/normalize-rules/src/service.rs)
│   ├── list        [--root] [--tag] [--kind] [--format]
│   ├── run         [--root] [--path] [--rule] [--format] [--json] [--sarif]
│   ├── enable      <rule-id> [--root]
│   ├── disable     <rule-id> [--root]
│   ├── show        <rule-id> [--root]
│   ├── tags        [--root]
│   ├── add         [--root] …
│   ├── update      <rule-id> [--root] …
│   ├── remove      <rule-id> [--root]
│   ├── setup       [--root]
│   ├── validate    [--root]
│   ├── compile     [--root]
│   ├── test        [--root] [--rule] [--snapshot]
│   └── test-fixtures [--root]
│
├── structure       (service/facts.rs)
│   ├── rebuild     [--root] [--full]
│   ├── stats       [--root]
│   ├── files       [--root]
│   ├── packages    [--root]
│   ├── query       <query> [--root] [--format]
│   └── test-fixtures [--root]
│
├── kg              (crates/normalize-knowledge-graph/src/service.rs)
│   ├── read        <selector> [--root]
│   ├── write       <transform> [--root]
│   └── walk        <start> [--kind] [--depth] [--root]
│
├── budget          (crates/normalize-budget/src/service.rs)
│   ├── measure     [--root] [--metric] [--format]
│   ├── add         <metric> <budget> [--root]
│   ├── check       [--root]
│   ├── update      <metric> <budget> [--root]
│   ├── show        [--root]
│   └── remove      <metric> [--root]
│
├── cfg             (crates/normalize-cfg/src/service.rs)
│   └── cfg         <path> --function <name> [--format]
│
├── ratchet         (crates/normalize-ratchet/src/service.rs)
│   ├── measure     [--root] [--metric]
│   ├── add         <metric> [--root] [--aggregate]
│   ├── check       [--root]
│   ├── update      [--root]
│   ├── show        [--root]
│   └── remove      <metric> [--root]
│
├── sessions        (service/sessions.rs)
│   ├── list        [--root] [--format] [--limit]
│   ├── show        <id> [--format]
│   ├── analyze     <id> [--format]
│   ├── stats       [--root] [--format]
│   ├── ngrams      [--root] [--n] [--limit]
│   ├── messages    [--root] [--filter]
│   ├── subagents   [--root]
│   ├── patterns    [--root]
│   ├── parallelization [--root]
│   ├── heatmap     [--root]
│   ├── cost        [--root]
│   ├── plans       [--root]
│   ├── mark        <id> [--tag]
│   └── unmark      <id> [--tag]
│
├── context         (service/context.rs — same name as root-level context, but sub-service)
│   ├── context     [--match …] [--stdin] [--prefix] [--file …] [--all] [--list]
│   └── migrate     [--apply]
│
├── package         (service/package.rs)
│   ├── info        [--root]
│   ├── list        [--root]
│   ├── tree        [--root]
│   ├── why         <package> [--root]
│   ├── outdated    [--root]
│   └── audit       [--root]
│
├── generate        (service/generate.rs)
│   ├── client      <spec.json> --lang <lang> [--output]
│   ├── types       <input> --backend <backend> [--format] [--output] [--export] [--infer-types] [--readonly] [--package] [--dry-run] [--split]
│   └── cli-snapshot <binary> [--output] [--name]
│
├── guide           (service/guide.rs)
│   ├── rules
│   ├── explore
│   ├── setup
│   ├── analyze
│   └── tree-sitter
│
├── syntax          (service/syntax.rs)
│   ├── ast         <path> [--language]
│   ├── query       <path> <query> [--language]
│   └── node-types  <language>
│
├── serve           (service/serve.rs)
│   ├── mcp         [--port] [--stdio]
│   ├── http        [--port] [--host]
│   └── lsp         [--stdio]
│
├── daemon          (service/daemon.rs)
│   ├── status
│   ├── stop
│   ├── start
│   ├── run
│   ├── add         <root>
│   ├── remove      <root>
│   ├── watch       [--root]
│   └── list
│
├── grammars        (service/grammars.rs)
│   ├── list
│   ├── install     [--force] [--target]
│   └── paths
│
├── tools           (service/tools.rs — sub-services at depth 3)
│   ├── lint        (LintService)
│   │   ├── run     [--root] [--fix]
│   │   └── list    [--root]
│   └── test        (TestService)
│       ├── run     [--root] [--filter]
│       └── list    [--root]
│
└── config          (service/config.rs)
    ├── schema      [--pretty]
    ├── show        [--root]
    ├── validate    [--root]
    └── set         <key> <value> [--root]
```

Global flags injected on every subcommand (via `global = [...]` in `#[cli]`):
- `--pretty` — human-friendly output with colours
- `--compact` — compact output, overrides TTY detection
- `--json` / `--jsonl` / `--jq <filter>` — JSON output modes (generated by server-less)
- `--input-schema` / `--output-schema` — per-command JSON Schema for params/return type (generated by server-less)

---

## 3. Existing flat-docs / dump capabilities

### What exists

**a. Per-command JSON Schema flags (via server-less `#[cli]` macro)**
Every leaf subcommand exposes:
- `--input-schema` — prints a JSON Schema for that command's parameters.
- `--output-schema` — prints a JSON Schema for that command's return type.
These are per-command only; there is no single invocation that dumps all schemas at once.

**b. `normalize --schema` (top-level, pre-parse in `main.rs`)**
```
normalize --schema
```
Returns:
```json
{
  "config_path": ".normalize/config.toml",
  "format": "toml",
  "schema": { /* JSON Schema for NormalizeConfig */ }
}
```
This is config-schema only — not CLI shape.

**c. `normalize generate cli-snapshot <binary>`**
Defined in `service/generate.rs` and `commands/generate.rs::generate_cli_snapshot_code`.
Recursively walks the binary's own `--help` output using `normalize-cli-parser::parse_help`, discovers all subcommands, and emits a Rust `#[test]` file (using `insta` + `assert_cmd`) that snapshots every `--help` invocation. This is the closest thing to a full-tree enumeration: it actually discovers and iterates every subcommand path.

**d. Hand-authored docs at `docs/cli/`**
`docs/cli/commands.md` contains a manually maintained table of all top-level groups and their descriptions. Individual pages (`docs/cli/analyze.md`, `docs/cli/view.md`, etc.) exist per group. These are not generated from source.

**e. `normalize-cli-parser` crate**
`crates/normalize-cli-parser/` contains a `parse_help()` function that parses `--help` output text into a structured spec. Used internally by `generate cli-snapshot`. Could be repurposed for a docs-dump tool.

### What does NOT exist
- No `normalize help --all` or `normalize --help-all` that prints the entire tree in one call.
- No markdown/manpage generator integrated into the CLI itself (server-less has a `#[markdown]` / `#[program]` preset that generates a `markdown_docs()` method, but **normalize does not use `#[program]`** — it uses bare `#[cli]`, so `markdown_docs()` is not available on `NormalizeService`).
- No shell completion generator exposed through `normalize` (the embedded `rg` and `ast-grep` sub-binaries have their own completion generators, but those are for those tools only).
- No single `--output-schema` at root level that dumps all command schemas.

---

## 4. Build technology summary

normalize is built with **server-less** (the host repo), not hand-rolled clap. The `#[cli]` attribute macro on `NormalizeService` and each sub-service generates all clap `Command` construction, dispatch, JSON output, and schema flags. External crates (`normalize-rules`, `normalize-budget`, `normalize-cfg`, `normalize-ratchet`, `normalize-knowledge-graph`) each define their own service structs with their own `#[cli]` annotations and are composed into `NormalizeService` as fields.

`clap 4` (derive mode) is present as a workspace dependency and is what server-less emits under the hood, but normalize code never calls clap directly — all clap usage flows through the server-less macro expansion.

---

## Key file paths

| Role | Path |
|------|------|
| Entry point / alias rewriting | `crates/normalize/src/main.rs` |
| Root CLI service + top-level commands | `crates/normalize/src/service/mod.rs` |
| Sub-services (one per group) | `crates/normalize/src/service/<name>.rs` |
| External crate services | `crates/normalize-{budget,cfg,knowledge-graph,ratchet,rules}/src/service.rs` |
| CLI snapshot generator | `crates/normalize/src/commands/generate.rs` |
| Help parser (used by snapshot gen) | `crates/normalize-cli-parser/src/` |
| Hand-authored CLI docs | `docs/cli/` |
| server-less `#[cli]` macro | `../server-less/crates/server-less-macros/src/cli.rs` |
| server-less `#[markdown]` macro | `../server-less/crates/server-less-macros/src/markdown.rs` |
